commands.short: Template for Go CLIs wrapping REST target systems

flags.name: config
flags.description: config file path; unset auto-discovers, empty disables file loading

flags.name: dry-run
flags.description: dry-run: mutating commands do not mutate

flags.name: log-level
flags.description: log level: debug, info, warn, error

flags.name: no-retry
flags.description: disable automatic retry of transient GET/HEAD failures

flags.name: yes
flags.description: assume yes for confirmations; required for mutating commands

commands.short: Emit the full command tree as JSON (introspection for skills)
Emit resolved config with per-value source attribution
